description: Install dependencies (framer-motion) and verify baseline build passes. Set up the project for animation work.
steps: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/bdjobs-ai && npm install` to install existing dependencies
Run `npm install framer-motion` to add the animation library
Run `npm run build` to verify everything builds correctly with the new dependency
Run `npm run lint` to verify no lint errors
acceptance_criteria: npm run build completes without errors
framer-motion is listed in package.json dependencies
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/bdjobs-ai && npm run build` and confirm exit code 0
Run `cd /projects/sandbox/bdjobs-ai && npm run lint` and confirm exit code 0
findings: framer-motion@12.40.0 installed successfully. Build uses Turbopack and completes in ~3.2s. Lint passes cleanly with eslint. There is a warning about multiple lockfiles (parent workspace at /projects/sandbox/ also has a package-lock.json) but it does not affect the build.
